underlying_goal: Redesign the Shopping Assistant chat widget layout: move welcome message with category buttons into the scrollable message feed, unify AI message blocks, ensure proper scroll positioning so the welcome message appears at the top of the visible viewport on popup open
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly failed to implement correct scroll-to-welcome behavior, trying multiple broken approaches (offsetTop, getBoundingClientRect, padding, flex spacer, inline styles) none of which worked, and also misunderstood the initial layout request placing the welcome message as a standalone stuck section instead of in the scrollable feed.
brief_summary: User wanted to restructure a chat widget layout and scroll behavior so the welcome message appears correctly positioned on open; after many failed scroll attempts and misunderstandings, the layout was partially fixed but scroll positioning remained broken.
